# moonshot

> A from-scratch LLM inference engine for Ampere (RTX 3090, sm_86), built kernel-up. The
> engine runs on pure-torch fallbacks with zero custom kernels; each CUDA kernel you add
> replaces one fallback and is scored as % of it. Built in the open as an AI-agentic
> project: agents drive plumbing/harnesses/docs, humans own the why-fast performance
> reasoning.

This file is the machine-readable index of the knowledge base. Each doc carries YAML
frontmatter (title, status, audience, updated, tags, related) and cross-links with relative
paths.

## Start here
- [overview](overview.md): what moonshot is, the two-track goal, the north star.
- [roadmap](roadmap.md): engineering phases (GEMM ladder → primitives → engine spine →
  FlashAttention → quantization → Triton/PyTorch → specialization) and milestones.

## Design
- [architecture](architecture.md): the extension seam — Python orchestration + `moonshot.ops`
  dispatch + CUDA C++ custom ops, engine-runs-on-fallbacks-first, kernels-as-plugins.
- [hardware-and-measurement](hardware-and-measurement.md): RTX 3090 / sm_86 constraints, the
  no-`ncu` profiling methodology, and the % -of-reference reporting discipline.

## Practice
- [ai-collaboration](ai-collaboration.md): the delegate-vs-own doctrine — what agents drive,
  what a human must own and defend at a whiteboard, and the definition of done.

## Logs
- [decisions/](decisions/): ADR-style decision log. Start at
  [0001-clean-agentic-restart](decisions/0001-clean-agentic-restart.md).
- [kernels/](kernels/): per-kernel knowledge notes and baselines.
